title: [codereview-pass1] coap_server.h missing includes for coap structs and socket after oscore addition
description: coap_server.h uses struct coap_resource, struct coap_packet, struct sockaddr, socklen_t but only includes std headers + oscore.h now. Transitive includes are fragile and may fail in some build configs. Add explicit #include <zephyr/net/coap.h> and <zephyr/net/socket.h>. P1 correctness. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-jqdq
close_reason: Fixed by adding explicit includes for zephyr/net/coap.h and zephyr/net/socket.h; forward declare for oscore_ctx restored to avoid public API bloat
